programmes.show_description: Tá aimsir fhuar geallta agus tá an bhliain beagnach caite sa Chuan. (As the cold weather sets in, the year in An Cuan is coming to an end.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Go Tuar Mhic Éadaigh ar bhruach Loch Measca a thabharfaidh Síle aghaidh. (Síle visits Tuar Mhic Éadaigh, a village nestled between the shores of Lough Mask & the Partry Mountains.)
Tabharfar aghaidh ar Ghaillimh, Maigh Eo, Tír Eoghain, an Iarmhí agus Liatroim sa gclár seo. (This week we are in Galway, Mayo, Tyrone, Westmeath and Leitrim.)
Clár tráth na gceist i nGaeilge do dhéagóirí! Scoil Pháirc Shruth na gCloch v Pobalscoil na Gráinsí. (Teen quiz show: Rockbrook Park School v Ramsgrange Community School.)
Leanfaidh Cormac lena thuras i gceantar sceirdiúil na Cruaiche Goirme i nDún na nGall. (Cormac continues his journey in the wild Bluestack Mountains of Donegal.)
Clár cúrsaí reatha seachtainiúil TG4. Déanfar scagadh agus plé ar scéalta nuachta. (Politics and the economy, regional, national and international affairs.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Is í Póilín Nic Géidigh a bheidh ag léamh scéal an lae inniu. (Today's story of the day is read by Póilín Nic Géidigh.)
Tá athair Cody ag iarraidh deirfiúr óg Cody a chur a chodladh. (Cody's dad is trying to put Cody's baby sister to sleep.)
Beidh cóisir ag JJ agus a chairde. (JJ and his animal friends have a dance party.)
Faigheann na Dathanna amach go gciallaíonn Glas stop! (The Colours find out that Green means stop!)
Socraíonn Cory dul chuig dhá chóisir ag an am céanna chun a chairde a shásamh. (Cory attends two birthday parties at the same time to keep both his friends happy.)
Oíche Shamhna atá ann is an bhfuil taibhse sa gharáiste? Tá Bobby an Bus ag sileadh ola. (Is there a ghost in the garage on Halloween? Bobby the Bus is leaking oil.)
Ag foghlaim faoi ollmhargaí a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about supermarkets today.)
Tá Pip agus Posy ag iarraidh fanacht ina suí go mbeidh sneaic i lár na hoíche acu le chéile. (Pip and Posy try to stay up late so they can have a midnight snack with each other.)
Síleann Bobble go bhfuil an sliabh ró-ard ach le cabhair ó Rollóir-Rith déanann sé a bhealach go barr an chnoic gan aon stró. (Flicky Flack helps Bobble climb a mountain.)
Glacann na Coileáin seilbh ar an gCeanncheathrú. (The Wolfies get into the HQ and transform it into their den!)
Lá Spóirt atá ann ach níl a fhios ag Wussywat cén comórtas ar cheart di páirt a ghlacadh ann. (It's Sports Day but Wussywat can't choose an event.)
Bogann an t-údar cáiliúil Bríd de Búrca chuig Oileán Birdwell. (Famous author, Natalie Chan, is moving to Birdwell Island.)
Baineann na cairde sult as an lá glantacháin. (The friends make a game of cleaning day.)
Baineann Úllchuilleog ga as Ginger agus fágtar cneá uirthi. (Ginger gets stung by an Appleflyus and it leaves a painful and incredibly itchy sore.)
Tá Dot agus Hal mór go leor anois le dul ar Ghoimh na nGoineog! (The funfair is in town and Dot and Hal are finally big enough to ride The Fanged Fury.)
Tá an tUasal Jackson ag iarraidh dul ag an bpictiúrlann. (Mr Jackson wants to go to the cinema.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Iarrtar ar Lotta aire a thabhairt do chailín nua ag an scoil. (Lotta is asked to watch over a new girl at school.)
Tá mac tíre óg sáinnithe ag MacTrapp agus caithfidh na Petronix teacht i gcabhair air. (When MacTrapp captures a Wolf Pup, the Petronix Team is on the scene!)
Tá béile blasta geallta ag a máthair do Lola nuair a fhillfidh sí ón dochtúir. (Lola's mother promises her a delicious meal when she gets home from the doctor.)
Caithfidh gach duine ar scoil bronntanas a thabhairt dá chéile. (Everyone has to give a gift to everyone else at school.)
Déantar ambasadóir de chineál éigin de Dhónall. (Dónall is made some kind of ambassador.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán spraíúil faoi Mary agus a cangarú a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about Mary who had a Kangaroo.)
Bíonn timpiste ag na Blocuimhreacha agus iad ag spraoi le liathróid. (When the numberblocks play with a ball their numberlings fall to the ground.)
Tá Donn an taiscéalaí le muid a thabhairt ar aistear sa bhforaois inniu. (Today, Brown the Explorer brings us on a journey through the forest.)
Glacann Bó, Caora agus Sicín páirt i gcomórtas ceoil. (Cow, Sheep and Secret Agent Chicken take part in a musical contest.)
Cuireann scéal an Zarbidule faitíos ar Gabi. (Gabi is afraid when she hears about the Zarbidule.)
Gléasfaidh Seán é féin mar a bheadh rí, róbat, Rómhánach agus imreoir rugbaí ann. (Today Seán dresses up as a king, a robot, a Roman, and a rugby player.)
Ní mó ná sásta a bhíonn Pip nuair a chloiseann sé a jóc inste ar bhealach mícheart. (Pip finds himself growing flustered at his funny joke being re-told incorrectly.)
Ní fada uainn an Cháisc agus mar sin déanfaidh Máire Treasa coinín as seanphéire stocaí. (Easter is nearly here and today Máire Treasa make a bunny out of old socks.)
Tá fiacail Dot bogtha ach tá sí ag ceapadh nach dtitfidh sí go deo! (Dot's loose tooth just won't fall out!)
Is gearr ó Dot a breithlá ach ní féidir léi smaoineamh ar bhronntanas a thaitneodh léi. (Dot's birthday is coming up but she can't seem to think of a present to wish for.)
Samhlaíonn Faith-Leigh an saol a bheidh aici ina leabharlannaí nuair a bheidh sí mór. (Faith-Leigh imagines her life as a librarian when she grows up.)
Tá bonn SAT (Séabra An-Tábhachtach) le bronnadh ar Uncail Zavier. (Uncle Zavier gets a VIZ (Very Important Zebra) medal today.)
Tá an comórtas tallainne ar siúl inniu agus tá gach duine seachas Tomaí ag cleachtadh. (The talent competition is happening today and everyone is practicing except Tommy.)
Inniu feicfidh muid spadán ag gluaiseacht go mall, gadhar glórach agus fia mór fiosrach. (Today we see sloths creeping, dogs are beeping, cats are leaping and elks are peeping!)
Dónal Ó Gallachóir a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín Tom Sheáinín ar an gclár seo. (Dónal Ó Gallachóir from Donegal will be chatting to Máirtín Tom Sheáinín on this show.)
Déanann Malcolm agus a dheartháireacha brabús ar obair charthanachta. (Malcolm and his brothers mine personal profit from some church charity work.)
Iarrann Frasier comhairle ar Sam faoin gcaidreamh atá aige le Diane. (Frasier asks Sam for some advice about his more intimate relationship with Diane.)
Ceol traidisiúnta den scoth ó gach cearn den tír á chur i láthair ag Eibhlín de Paor agus Breandán Ó Beaglaoich. (Traditional music series featuring the best regional performers.)
In San Fransico maraítear fear poiblíochta raidió mór le rá nuair a athraíonn sé leagan amach atá ar chlár. (A hot-shot San Francisco radio promoter is murdered.)
Tabharfar aghaidh ar Ghaillimh, Maigh Eo, Tír Eoghain, an Iarmhí agus Liatroim sa gclár seo. (This week we are in Galway, Mayo, Tyrone, Westmeath and Leitrim.)
Clár tráth na gceist i nGaeilge do dhéagóirí! Scoil Pháirc Shruth na gCloch v Pobalscoil na Gráinsí. (Teen quiz show: Rockbrook Park School v Ramsgrange Community School.)
Tugann Paul aghaidh ar Loch Etive. (Paul explores the wilds of Loch Etive.)
Beidh scoth an cheoil tíre ar an gclár seo le Shawn Cuddy. (One of country music giants, Shawn Cuddy gives a captivating performance on Glór Tíre with a great mix of old favourites.)
Tá rún ag Nancy agus Jeremy Sydney a fhágáil agus bogadh go Hobart. (Nancy and Jeremy decide to swap their busy Sydney existence for a quieter life in Hobart.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Déanann Malcolm agus a dheartháireacha brabús ar obair charthanachta. (Malcolm and his brothers mine personal profit from some church charity work.)
Is ainmhithe thar a bheith spéisiúil iad na ceifealapóid, tá an t-ochtapas ar cheann díobh. (Cephalopods are fascinating animals, of which the octopus is one.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

Tugann Doireann Ní Ghlacáin aghaidh ar Chiarraí Thuaidh sa gclár seo chun blaiseadh a fháil de cheol na háite. (Doireann Ní Ghlacáin explores North Kerry's rich musical tradition.)
Feicfear Craobh Lomadh Caorach na hÉireann ag Seó Chluain Maine sa gclár seo. (We head to the Clonmany Show to see the All-Ireland Sheep Shearing Championship.)
Iarrann Frasier comhairle ar Sam faoin gcaidreamh atá aige le Diane. (Frasier asks Sam for some advice about his more intimate relationship with Diane.)
Leanfaidh an Dr. Colm Mac Gearailt lorg Annraoi Ó Liatháin fad na Siúire. (Dr. Colm Mac Gearailt follows in the footsteps of Annraoi Ó Liatháin along the River Suir.)
Téann Colby chuig an áit inár tharla na dúnmharaithe in 1968. (Colby retraces Amanda's steps at the beach where the 1968 murders occurred.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Faigheann na hiarrthóir litreacha ón mbaile nach raibh súil ar bith acu leo. (Castaways get the biggest reward of the season with surprise letters from home.)
Éamon de Valera a bhí ina Uachtarán ar Éirinn ó 1959-73 a bheidh faoi chaibidil sa gclár seo. (Éamon de Valera who was President of Ireland from 1959-73 is the focus of this episode.)

Is in Bratislava a chuirfidh Séaghan, Proinsias agus Louise deireadh leis an tsraith. (The gang's final stop is Bratislava, and they're going out with a bang!)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá cuileog sa teach! Tá Clúmh ina dhiaidh agus níl tada chun é a stopadh. (There's a fly in the den! Fluff is in hot pursuit, and nothing will stand in his way.)
Téann Melody agus Bop chuig an margadh agus tá neart ar díol ag na stainníní éagsúla. (Melody and Bop are in the market where there are stalls selling lots of different things.)
Bíonn air Timmy teacht i gcabhair ar a chairde. (When Timmy's friends get in trouble by the seaside, he has to try and rescue them.)
Ag seoltóireacht a bheidh Abby agus Rudy inniu! (Abby and Rudy are sailing on the high seas today!)
Ní mór do Pip agus Posy a thaispeáint do Zac nach gá dó faitíos a bheith air roimh stoirmeacha. (Pip and Posy must show Zac that storms aren't anything to be afraid of.)
Tá fail ar Iasc Mór agus déanann na hOlobobanna 'Deilgneach' le cabhrú léi. (When Big Fish has hiccups the Olobobs make her Prickle, who encourages her to keep calm.)
Caitheann Kevin am le Gekko mar nach dteastaíonn uaidh a bheith dána ar nós Howler agus Rip. (While The Wolfys run amok, Gekko doubts he has what it takes to be good.)
Milleann Wussywat dhá cháca breithlá Oirtís agus caithfidh sí ceann nua a fháil anois. (Wussywat accidentally ruins both of Ortus' birthday cakes.)
Rachaidh Zou agus a chairde ag iascaireacht inniu. Tá comórtas idir Uncail Zavier agus Zou. (Zou and his friends go fishing today.)
Beidh Ricky ag tabhairt aire d'fhéileacán inniu. (Today, Ricky tries to look after a butterfly!)
Tá Ginger agus na Piseanna-Rex ag iarraidh an Fatadón a bhlaiseadh. (Ginger and the Pea Rex's want to lick the Potatodon.)
Aimsíonn Dot agus a cairde rud aisteach sa loch. (Dot and her friends come across a strange item deep in the lake.)
Faigheann Henry preabaire mar bhronntanas agus socraíonn Ella ceann a dhéanamh di féin. (Henry receives a Space Hopper as a present and  Ella decides she will make one.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá Lola ag ceapadh go bhfuil an t-ádh ag rith léi, sin go dtéann chuig an bpictiúrlann le Charlie. (Lola feels extremely lucky until she and Charlie set out to go to the cinema.)
Imríonn Pinocchio cleas ar na Banphrionsaí Jodelle agus Neantóg. (Pinocchio plays a trick on Princesses Jodelle and Neantóg.)
Cuireann Sleamhnaí muince ghoidte i bhfolach i seanbhábóg. (Sleamhnaí hides a stolen necklace inside an old doll.)
Tá Angelo ag iarraidh amhrán nua an bhanna 'Slobber' a chloisteáil. (The band Slobber have a new song and Angelo wants to hear it.)
Tugann Dónall a chuid bréagán ar fad uaidh. (Dónall gives away all of his toys.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán spraíúil faoi bheith ag oscailt agus ag dúnadh a bheidh inniu againn. (A fun song about opening and shutting.)
Cuireann Deich roinnt Blocuimhreacha ag déanamh aclaíochta. (Ten gets some of the Numberblocks exercising.)
Tá iontas ar na Dathanna faoi na dathanna ar fad is féidir a úsáid chun Donn a dhéanamh. (The Colours are surprised to see how many Colours can make Brown.)
Cabhraíonn na Blociontais le hEalaí an t-urlár rince a mhaisiú. (The Wonderblocks help Arty hop in different directions to light up the disco floor!)
Caithfidh na Blocuimhreacha dul sa tóir ar thaisce an Chaptaen Heicsea-Fhéasóg! (The Numberblocks must seek Captain Hexabeard's treasure.)
Líonann Posy a bolg sula dtéann sí chuig teach Pip ach bíonn féasta réitithe ag Pip dóibh. (Posy fills up on snacks whilst heading to Pip's house but Pip has prepared a feast.)
Bhí an-lá ag Ribín ach bhí fíor-dhrochlá ag Glibín. Céard a tharla? (Ribín had an amazing day but poor Glibín had a terrible day. How could this be?)
Daltaí Ghaelscoil Chluain Dolcáin a rachaidh i mbun pinn an tseachtain seo chun amhrán a chumadh faoi na séasúir. (Music series for children presented by John Sharpson.)
Tá George cinnte go bhfuil eilifint ina pheata ag an gcomharsa thuas staighre. (George is convinced that the new upstairs neighbour has an elephant as a pet.)
Samhlaíonn Ruarc a shaol ina theagascóir aclaíochta nuair a bheidh sé mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Ruarc imagines his life as a gym instructor when he grows up.)
Imreoidh Zou agus a chairde cluichí séabracha sa sneachta inniu. (Zou and his friends enjoy some zebric games in the snow today.)
Is é an Méara de Pfeffel a bheidh ina mholtóir ar Chomórtas na mBláthbhoscaí Fuinneoige. (Mayor de Pfeffel is going to be judging the Wonderful Window-Box Competition.)
Inniu feicfidh muid réabadh, grá agus ruaille buaille! (Today we'll see action, romance and plenty of drama!)
Máire Ní Chéileachair a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín Tom Sheáinín ar an gclár seo. (Máire Ní Chéileachar from Cork will be chatting to Máirtín Tom Sheáinín on this show.)
Tagann dochtúir Hal ar mheall le linn scrúdú sláinte. (Hal's doctor finds a suspicious lump during a routine medical checkup.)
Castar mian a chroí ar Cliff ag cóisir Oíche Shamhna in Cheers. (During a Halloween party at Cheers, Cliff meets the girl of his dreams.)
Sraith ceoil thraidisiúnta, beidh an Four Star Trio agus Mary Mitchell sa gclár seo. (This programme features the Four Star Trio, Eoin and Danny Ó Súilleabháin and Mary Mitchell.)
Dúnmharaítear duine de na haíonna ag cóisir bhréigéide. (An unwanted guest is murdered at a costume party.)
Léargas ar shaol fíorshuimiúil ainmhithe fiáine as ceithre hairde na cruinne. (We explore the rich and varied world of animal behaviour.)
Téann Paul ar thuras ag dul ó Loch Gairloch go Loch Maree. (Paul travels from Loch Gairloch to Loch Maree.)
Beidh scoth an cheoil tíre ar an gclár seo le Robert Mizell agus Anne-Marie O'Connor. (This show features the best Country music featuring Robert Mizell & Anne-Marie O'Connor.)
Socraíonn Joe agus Amy bogadh go háit éigin níos teo cois farraige. (Joe and Amy succumb to the lure of warmer weather and a seaside location.)

Clár deiridh na sraithe: beidh an Grúpa Ceirde i Ré na nDoirí ag taispeáint a gcuid oibre. (In the final episode, the Grúpa Ceirde in Ré na nDoirí show us their creations.)
Tá plean ag Cam chun an ceann is fearr a fháil ar Cora. (Cam comes up with a plan to sabotage Cora and manages to get Vince in on it too.)

Tá Téacs Taistil ar ais! Tugann na taistealaithe aghaidh ar Toronto sa gclár seo. (Téacs Taistil is back! This week, the gang touch down in Toronto.)
Tugtar léargas ar thionscal dorcha na seacláide sa gclár faisnéise seo. (A gripping documentary about the bitter side of chocolate production.)
